tests.description: renders the empty shell with the TabCommand logo and the placeholder content
tests.key: App › renders the logo and zero seed counts when storage is empty

tests.description: reflects seeded storage counts read through the shim + Chrome.get path
tests.key: App › shows non-zero counts when storage is seeded

tests.description: array-typed keys hydrate to [] when storage has no value
tests.key: Chrome › hydrates activeTabs/allUrls/previousLabels to [] when absent

tests.description: hash-typed keys hydrate to {} when storage has no value
tests.key: Chrome › hydrates labels/uxSettings/autoClosed to {} when absent

tests.description: present values are passed through untouched (no default applied)
tests.key: Chrome › passes through requested keys that are present

tests.description: remove delegates straight to chrome.storage.local.remove
tests.key: Chrome › remove delegates to chrome.storage.local.remove

tests.description: set delegates straight to chrome.storage.local.set
tests.key: Chrome › set delegates to chrome.storage.local.set

tests.description: previousLabels drops falsy entries and strips each entry's timestamp
tests.key: Chrome › strips timestamp and drops falsy previousLabels entries

tests.description: the single-string key form is supported and still hydrates its default
tests.key: Chrome › supports a single string key

tests.description: action stubs are callable and no-op (resolve callbacks / empty queries)
tests.key: chromeShim › exposes callable no-op action stubs

tests.description: get accepts the string, array, and null (all) key forms
tests.key: chromeShim › get supports string, array, and all forms

tests.description: seeded localStorage hydrates the in-memory store on install
tests.key: chromeShim › hydrates the store from seeded localStorage

tests.description: a malformed seed value is ignored rather than crashing the boot
tests.key: chromeShim › ignores malformed seed values

tests.description: install is inert when a real extension chrome.storage.local already exists
tests.key: chromeShim › is inert when a real chrome.storage.local is present

tests.description: remove clears the key from both the store and localStorage and fires onChanged
tests.key: chromeShim › remove clears the key and fires onChanged with the old value

tests.description: removeListener detaches a previously-added listener
tests.key: chromeShim › removeListener stops delivering change events

tests.description: set merges into the store, mirrors to localStorage, and fires onChanged
tests.key: chromeShim › set mirrors to localStorage and fires onChanged with areaName local

tests.description: the known-keys list is the shared TabCommand storage contract
tests.key: chromeShim › shares the known TabCommand storage keys

tests.description: focuses the existing TabCommand tab when one is already open
tests.key: popup.js › init › activates an existing TabCommand tab

tests.description: opens a new pinned TabCommand tab when none exists
tests.key: popup.js › init › creates a pinned tab when none exists

tests.description: renders a row per stored active tab into the #active container
tests.key: popup.js › loadActiveTabs › renders a div per active tab

tests.description: leaves strings at or under the limit unchanged
tests.key: popup.js › truncateString › leaves short strings unchanged

tests.description: returns empty string for falsy input
tests.key: popup.js › truncateString › returns "" for empty/undefined input

tests.description: truncates longer strings and appends an ellipsis
tests.key: popup.js › truncateString › truncates long strings with an ellipsis

tests.description: includes an averaged stats block when there is at least one sample
tests.key: popup.js › urlHTML › renders an averaged stats block when there are samples

tests.description: renders the title heading and favicon, omitting stats when no samples
tests.key: popup.js › urlHTML › renders title + favicon and no stats when samples is 0

tests.description: truncates an over-long title inside the heading
tests.key: popup.js › urlHTML › truncates long titles via truncateString

tests.description: merges per-tab url updates for each task tab id in the process
tests.key: service_worker.js › associateProcess › fetches each task tab and merges its url updates

tests.description: a deliberately empty trace hook — returns undefined and never throws
tests.key: service_worker.js › central › is a no-op

tests.description: moves the closed url to the front of allUrls and runs the callback
tests.key: service_worker.js › closeUrl › reorders allUrls, persists, and invokes the callback

tests.description: invokes the callback form with the chrome result
tests.key: service_worker.js › getLocalStorage › invokes the callback with the storage result

tests.description: resolves a promise with the result when no callback is given
tests.key: service_worker.js › getLocalStorage › resolves with the result when no callback is passed

tests.description: short-circuits to null for absent / sentinel ids
tests.key: service_worker.js › getTabGroup › resolves null for id -1 or null

tests.description: resolves the chrome.tabGroups.get result for a real id
tests.key: service_worker.js › getTabGroup › resolves the group for a real id

tests.description: builds a url- prefixed key, stripping any hash fragment
tests.key: service_worker.js › getUrlKey › prefixes with url- and strips the fragment

tests.description: skips pinned tabs entirely
tests.key: service_worker.js › groupTabs › ignores pinned tabs

tests.description: ungroups a tab that no longer matches any label
tests.key: service_worker.js › groupTabs › ungroups an unlabeled grouped tab

tests.description: returns early when there is no previous value to diff against
tests.key: service_worker.js › handleActiveTabsGroupChanges › no-ops when oldValue is missing

tests.description: swallows the error when the processes API is unavailable
tests.key: service_worker.js › listenToProcesses › does not throw when the processes API throws

tests.description: subscribes processProcesses to the memory-update event
tests.key: service_worker.js › listenToProcesses › registers the processes listener

tests.description: registers chrome listeners at load without throwing
tests.key: service_worker.js › loads and registers chrome event listeners on import

tests.description: adds a brand-new url key to the front of allUrls
tests.key: service_worker.js › newUrl › prepends an unseen url key to allUrls

tests.description: returns undefined when called without a tab id or url
tests.key: service_worker.js › newUrl › returns early without tabId/url

tests.description: extracts the integer tab id from a "tab-<n>" key
tests.key: service_worker.js › parseTabId › parses the numeric id from a tabKey

tests.description: increments the sample counter and writes accumulated totals
tests.key: service_worker.js › processProcesses › bumps samples and persists process totals

tests.description: resolves keyed url updates for a valid tab
tests.key: service_worker.js › tabUpdates › resolves keyed url updates for a valid tab

tests.description: resolves an empty object for tabs that fail the validity check
tests.key: service_worker.js › tabUpdates › resolves {} for an invalid tab

tests.description: records the group title keyed by its integer id
tests.key: service_worker.js › trackGroup › stores the group title by id

tests.description: writes the supplied object straight to chrome.storage.local
tests.key: service_worker.js › update › persists updates to chrome.storage.local

tests.description: queries normal-window tabs and writes the rebuilt activeTabs list
tests.key: service_worker.js › updateActiveTabs › queries tabs and persists the rebuilt active list

tests.description: treats missing metrics as zero
tests.key: service_worker.js › updateTotals › defaults missing metrics to 0

tests.description: accumulates each process metric into the running totals
tests.key: service_worker.js › updateTotals › sums process metrics into processTotals

tests.description: accumulates process stats and bumps the sample counter
tests.key: service_worker.js › urlUpdates › accumulates process stats when a process is supplied

tests.description: initializes a processes bucket and copies tab metadata
tests.key: service_worker.js › urlUpdates › initializes processes and copies title/favicon/groupId

tests.description: falls back to the url as the title when the tab has none
tests.key: service_worker.js › urlUpdates › uses the url as title when title is missing

tests.description: accepts ordinary web URLs
tests.key: service_worker.js › validTab › accepts http and https tabs

tests.description: rejects empty and browser-internal schemes
tests.key: service_worker.js › validTab › rejects empty and internal-scheme tabs
